case_title: CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE VS. WILLIAM POWER

docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,212.00 FILED BY CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT POWER, WILLIAM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-05-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
